---
title: "{{< var title >}}"
author:
  - name: "{{< var author >}}"
  - name: "{{< var author2 >}}"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y %b %d')`"
format:
  pptx:
    reference-doc: StJude_template.pptx
    output-file: Summary
---

## Overview of Project

```{r results='asis'}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warnings: false
#| results: 'asis'

## GENERATE QC PLOTS
source("proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

results <- readRDS("results.rds")

# imports contrast file
contrast_table <- read.csv(contrasts,stringsAsFactors = F, header = F)

num_prot_samples <- dim(results$data)
num_prot <- num_prot_samples[1]
num_samples <- num_prot_samples[2]
num_groups <- unique(results$metadata$group)

# Extract the part before '='
comparisons <- trimws(sub("=.*", "", contrast_table[[1]]))

# Extract just the part after '=' for each comparison
#comparisons <- trimws(sub(".*=\\s*", "", contrast_table[[1]]))
#comparisons <- contrast_table[[1]]

#numbers <- list(num_prot, num_samples, num_groups, comparisons)
#cat(paste('-', numbers), sep='\n')
#cat(paste('-', "Number of samples =",num_samples),sep='\n')
#cat(paste('-', "Group =",num_groups),sep='\n')
#cat(paste('-', "Number of quantified proteins =",num_prot),sep='\n')
#cat(paste('-', "Comparison:",comparisons),sep='\n')

output <- paste0(
  "::: {.tiny}\n",
  "- **Number of samples** = ", num_samples, "\n",
  "- **Number of quantified proteins** = ", num_prot, "\n",
  "- **Comparisons:**\n"
)

# Add each comparison as its own bullet
comparison_lines <- paste0("  - ", comparisons, collapse = "\n")

# Close block
end <- "\n:::"

# Output the final content
cat(paste0(output, comparison_lines, end))

```

## Protein Intensities for All Samples

![](figures/Boxplot_allsamples.png)

## Total Protein Intensities

![](figures/Barplot_allsamples.png)

## Total Protein Intensities

![](figures/Barplot_split_allsamples.png)

## Principal Component Analysis PC1 and PC2

![](figures/PCA_PC12.png)

## Principal Component Analysis PC3 and PC4

![](figures/PCA_PC34.png)

## Clustered Dendrogram 

![](figures/Dendrogram_byGroup.png)

## Proteins with Missing Values

![](figures/Heatmap_MissingVal_allsamples.png)

## Differential Abundance Summary

```{r DAsummary}
#| eval: true
#| echo: false
#| warnings: false
#| results: 'asis'

source("proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

DA_sum <- read.csv(file=file.path(DA_dir, "DA_summary.csv"))
knitr::kable(DA_sum, format = "pandoc")

``` 



```{r , include = FALSE}

source("proteoDA_params.R")
# DiaNN quan output
setwd(working_dir)

myplots1 <- list()
for (i in 1:length(results$results)){
  png_file <- file.path(names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-adjusted-pval", fsep="")
  png_file2 <- file.path(DA_dir, "static_plots", png_file, fsep = "/")
  png_file3 <- file.path(png_file2, "_1.png", fsep="")  
  
 #png_file3 <- file.path(DA_dir, "static_plots", names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-adjusted-pval", "_1.png")
  #print(png_file2)
  print(png_file3)
  
  myplots1 <- append(myplots1, png_file3)
  
  
 #knitr::include_graphics(png_file3)
}
#myplots <- noquote(myplots)
print(myplots1)

index1 <- 1:length(myplots1)

```


```{r Vol_adjusted, include = TRUE}
#| output: asis

res <- purrr::map_chr(index1, \(index1) {
  knitr::knit_child(text = c(
    "## Volcano Plots - Adjusted p-values",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "![](`r as.character(myplots1[index1])`)",
    ""), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
    })

#res <- knitr::knit_child(text = src, quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```



```{r, include = FALSE}
myplots <- list()
for (i in 1:length(results$results)){
  png_file <- file.path(names(results$results)[i], "-volcano-raw-pval", fsep="")
  png_file2 <- file.path(DA_dir, "static_plots", png_file, fsep = "/")
  png_file3 <- file.path(png_file2, "_1.png", fsep="")  
  #print(png_file2)
  print(png_file3)
  
  myplots <- append(myplots, png_file3)
  
  
 #knitr::include_graphics(png_file3)
}
#myplots <- noquote(myplots)
#print(myplots)
index <- 1:length(myplots)

```

```{r vol_raw, include = TRUE}
#| output: asis

res <- purrr::map_chr(index, \(index) {
  knitr::knit_child(text = c(
    "## Volcano Plots - unadjusted p-values",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "",
    "![](`r as.character(myplots[index])`)",
    ""), envir = environment(), quiet = TRUE)
    })

#res <- knitr::knit_child(text = src, quiet = TRUE)
cat(res, sep = '\n')
```
